About Us

Shaping principled leaders through holistic education since 2007.

Our History

Rohi Schools began in September 2007 with Rohi Kiddies — a creche, nursery, and primary school. In 2015, Rohi College was added. By 2022, our first graduating class achieved full WASSCE and NECO success.

Mission & Goals

Our goal is to raise children who are:

  • Morally upright and disciplined
  • Academically excellent
  • Spiritually grounded
  • Equipped to live exemplary lives

Who We Are

Rohi Schools is a citadel of excellence with a calm and focused environment. We pride ourselves in nurturing:

  • National pride and cultural identity
  • Love, truth, and resilience
  • Balanced life preparation

Our Proprietor

Pastor Olusegun Adeyemi Anibaba, is from Imota, Ikorodu, Lagos State. He studied Applied Chemistry at Federal Polytechnic Ilaro where he bagged his HND in 1991. He taught for 10 years in government owned schools in Ogun State. He served as Traveling Secretary at Scripture Union Ogun State, Nigeria for some years. With his wealth of knowledge in education, the Lord helped him and his wife to establish Rohi Group of Schools.

Our Proprietress

Mrs. Jadesola Yetunde Anibaba bagged her Master of Education (MEd) in Teacher Education from the nation pioneer university, The University of Ibadan, Oyo State, Nigeria between 2012 to 2014.

What Sets Us Apart

Complete Education Path

We offer consistent care from creche to college, ensuring continuous student development.

Godly & Moral Foundation

We shape lives with integrity, discipline, and a heart for service in all spheres of life.

Experienced & Caring Staff

Our team consists of qualified educators who are committed to delivering quality daily.

Rohi Schools

Raising principled leaders through sound education.
